summary: Iteration 237: Complete testing of UX Cleanup and Global Confirmation Modal System. All features verified working correctly - no popups on page load, global confirmation modal works across all portals, logout confirmation functions properly.

tests: AppLauncher shows on every fresh page load
AppLauncher displays branded triad animation with nodes, lines, glow
Wordmark 'Konekt' and tagline fade in
AppLauncher completes in ~2.5s and removes from DOM
Content transitions cleanly after launcher completes
Login page loads cleanly without any popups
Homepage loads without CountrySelectorModal popup
No ExitIntentPopup appears on any page
No PromoBanner appears on any page
No FirstOrderDiscountModal appears on any page
No ClientPromoStrip appears on any page
No ClientBannerCarousel appears on any page
Country defaults to Tanzania (TZ) without modal
Admin login works correctly (admin@konekt.co.tz)
Admin logout triggers global confirmation modal
Modal shows correct title: 'Sign Out?'
Modal shows correct message about unsaved changes
Cancel button closes modal without logging out
Sign Out button logs out and redirects to /login
Customer login works correctly (test@konekt.tz)
Customer portal logout triggers global confirmation modal
Modal shows correct title: 'Sign Out?'
Modal shows correct message about customer account
Cancel button closes modal without logging out
Sign Out button logs out and redirects to /login
Modal has correct data-testid attributes
Modal has title, message, cancel and confirm buttons
Modal uses danger tone (red) for logout actions
Modal backdrop blocks interaction with page
Modal closes on Cancel click
No window.confirm() calls found in codebase
All confirmations use global ConfirmModalProvider

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 237 verified: (1) All interruptive popups removed - ExitIntentPopup, PromoBanner, FirstOrderDiscountModal, CountrySelectorModal, ClientPromoStrip, ClientBannerCarousel. (2) Global ConfirmModalProvider wraps entire app in App.js. (3) All logout handlers use confirmAction() from useConfirmModal() hook. (4) AppLauncher animation plays on every hard refresh (~2.5s total). (5) Country defaults to TZ without modal. (6) No window.confirm() calls in codebase - all replaced with global modal.
